json_data.title: Data Science Basics
json_data.reason: Understanding data collection, cleaning, and visualization is crucial for preparing the data used in machine learning projects.

json_data.title: Supervised Learning Algorithms
json_data.reason: This topic delves into the specific techniques and models used for making predictions from labeled data, a core type of machine learning.

json_data.title: Deep Learning Architectures
json_data.reason: Exploring various deep neural network designs like CNNs and RNNs provides insight into the advanced models driving applications like image recognition and language translation.
